titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ghiyath Ibn Ibrahim
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ghiyath Ibn Ibrahim

segments: ه عن غياث بن إبراهيم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن إسماعيل بن بزيع؛ و محمّد بن يحيى الخزّاز، عن غياث بن إبراهيم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن غياث بن إبراهيم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن محمّد بن إسماعيل بن بزيع؛ و محمّد بن يحيى الخزّاز، عن غياث بن إبراهيم‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Muhammad ibn Ismail ibn Bazi and Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Khazzaz, from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Muhammad ibn Ismail ibn Bazi and Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Khazzaz, from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim.
